tasks.description: Remove ensureWatchOpen() call from helot_run handler
tasks.changes: In the helot_run tool handler (the if block where name === 'helot_run'), remove the single line that calls ensureWatchOpen(). Do not change anything else in the file. Keep the ensureWatchOpen function definition intact.

tasks.description: Prevent browser reopening on every MCP server restart using a sentinel file
tasks.changes: In the server.listen callback inside startDashboard, wrap the exec browser-open calls with a sentinel check. Before opening the browser, add: const sentinelPath = path.join(stateDir, 'dashboard.opened'); const shouldOpen = !fs.existsSync(sentinelPath) || (Date.now() - fs.statSync(sentinelPath).mtimeMs > 60_000); if (shouldOpen) { fs.writeFileSync(sentinelPath, String(Date.now())); then the existing exec calls, closing the if block. The stateDir is the parameter passed to startDashboard.
